speaker: speaker1
text: Were you in a leadership position when you were a college student ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I was president of the Student Council of our university .

speaker: speaker1
text: Did you get any honors or awards at your university ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I was elected Excellent Party Member for four academic years .

speaker: speaker1
text: Were you involved in any club activities at your university ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . I was a member of the Student Poetry Society . I like writing poems in my spare time .

speaker: speaker1
text: What extracurricular activities did you usually take part in at your college ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I sometimes played table tennis and sometimes played basketball .
